meta.title: Interior Designer in Indore | Premium Interior Designers, Architects & Decorators
meta.description: Premium interior designers in Indore for homes and offices. Free consultation call, site visits, 3D designs, and turnkey interiors from ₹25,000. Serving Vijay Nagar, Palasia, Scheme 54 & all Indore.

modernInteriorHero.heading: Interior Designer in Indore | Premium Interior Designers, Architects, and Decorators
description: Studio Amber's Interior Designers in Indore transform homes and offices in the city by offering turnkey interior design projects starting from ₹25,000.
We work closely with homeowners in Vijay Nagar, Palasia, Scheme 54, Scheme 140, and other parts of Indore to reimagine their living experience.
We enhance all kinds of residential spaces in the city — 1BHK flats, 2BHK and 3BHK apartments, villas, and independent houses.

main.alt: Luxury dark interior design with warm golden lighting — premium home project in Indore

lamp.alt: Dark moody bedroom interior with warm accent lighting by Indore interior designers

chair.alt: Warm dark wood and ambient lighting interior design by architects in Indore
